components.name: Button
components.description: A versatile button component with multiple variants and sizes for different use cases

components.name: Input
components.description: A flexible input field component with validation states and multiple sizes

components.name: Badge
components.description: A small badge component for displaying status, counts, or labels

components.name: StatusPill
components.description: A compact operational state pill for admin tables, orders, payments, and user workflows

components.name: FilterSummary
components.description: A compact active-filter summary with removable chips and clear-all behavior for search-heavy admin screens

examples.title: Active Filters
examples.code: <FilterSummary aria-label="Active order filters"><FilterSummaryList><FilterSummaryItem label="Status" value="Open" onRemove={removeStatus} /></FilterSummaryList><FilterSummaryClear onClear={clearFilters} /></FilterSummary>

components.name: Avatar
components.description: A user avatar component with image fallback and initials support, built with Radix UI

components.name: Card
components.description: A container component for grouping related content with header, body, and footer sections

components.name: AdminShell
components.description: A backoffice application frame with sidebar, topbar, panel, and main content landmarks

components.name: PageHeader
components.description: A backoffice page header with title, description, metadata, and grouped actions

components.name: Modal
components.description: A dialog/modal component for displaying content in an overlay, built with Radix UI

components.name: Drawer
components.description: A slide-out panel component for side navigation or additional content, built with Radix UI

components.name: Tabs
components.description: A tabbed interface component for organizing content into separate views, built with Radix UI

components.name: DataCard
components.description: A specialized card for displaying data with labels, values, and optional trends

components.name: MetricCard
components.description: A dashboard KPI card with value, trend, tone, supporting text, visual slot, and footer metadata

components.name: DataTable
components.description: A table component for displaying structured data with sorting and styling options

components.name: DataToolbar
components.description: A table and list toolbar for search, filters, result metadata, and actions

components.name: BulkActionBar
components.description: A sticky selected-row action bar for admin tables and bulk workflows

examples.title: Selected Row Actions
examples.code: <BulkActionBar aria-label="Selected order actions"><BulkActionBarSelection count={3} label="orders selected" /><BulkActionBarActions aria-label="Bulk order actions"><Button>Assign</Button></BulkActionBarActions><BulkActionBarClear onClear={clearSelection} /></BulkActionBar>

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: An empty table and list state with title, description, decorative icon, and recovery actions

examples.title: No Results
examples.code: <EmptyState aria-label="No orders found"><EmptyStateTitle>No orders found</EmptyStateTitle><EmptyStateDescription>Adjust filters or create the first order.</EmptyStateDescription></EmptyState>

components.name: Timeline
components.description: A semantic activity history component for audit trails, order events, and status changes

examples.title: Order Activity
examples.code: <Timeline aria-label="Order activity"><TimelineItem><TimelineMarker variant="success" /><TimelineContent><TimelineTitle>Order packed</TimelineTitle><TimelineDescription>Warehouse team completed final scan.</TimelineDescription></TimelineContent></TimelineItem></Timeline>

components.name: DescriptionList
components.description: A semantic label-value metadata component for detail panels, drawers, and record pages

components.name: RecordInspector
components.description: A compact record detail panel for backoffice review, metadata, actions, and activity

components.name: Stat
components.description: A component for displaying statistics with labels, values, and optional trend indicators

components.name: ProductCard
components.description: A card component optimized for displaying product information including images, titles, and prices

components.name: CartItem
components.description: A component for displaying shopping cart items with quantity controls and removal options

components.name: PriceTag
components.description: A component for displaying prices with optional original price and discount information

components.name: QuantitySelector
components.description: A component for selecting quantities with increment and decrement buttons

examples.title: Quantity Selector with Limits
examples.code: <QuantitySelector value={5} min={1} max={10} size="lg" onChange={(val) => console.log(val)} />

components.name: Hero
components.description: A hero section component for landing pages with headline, description, and call-to-action

examples.title: Centered Hero
examples.code: <Hero alignment="center"><HeroHeadline>Welcome to Our Product</HeroHeadline><HeroDescription>The best solution for your needs</HeroDescription><HeroActions><Button>Get Started</Button></HeroActions></Hero>

components.name: FeatureGrid
components.description: A grid layout component for displaying features with icons, titles, and descriptions

components.name: CTA
components.description: A call-to-action component for encouraging user actions with headlines and buttons

examples.title: Centered CTA
examples.code: <CTA alignment="center"><CTAHeadline>Ready to get started?</CTAHeadline><CTADescription>Join thousands of satisfied customers</CTADescription><CTAActions><Button>Sign Up Now</Button></CTAActions></CTA>

examples.title: Card Style CTA
examples.code: <CTA variant="card" alignment="left"><CTAHeadline>Boost Your Productivity</CTAHeadline><CTADescription>Try it free for 14 days</CTADescription><CTAActions><Button>Start Free Trial</Button></CTAActions></CTA>

components.name: Testimonial
components.description: A component for displaying customer testimonials with quotes, names, and avatars

examples.title: Simple Testimonial
examples.code: <Testimonial><TestimonialQuote>This product changed our business!</TestimonialQuote><TestimonialAuthor name="John Doe" role="CEO" /></Testimonial>

examples.title: Card Testimonial with Avatar
examples.code: <Testimonial variant="card"><TestimonialQuote>Amazing experience from start to finish</TestimonialQuote><TestimonialAuthor name="Jane Smith" role="Designer" avatar="/avatar.jpg" /></Testimonial>

components.name: FormLayout
components.description: Sectioned CRUD form layout primitives for backoffice create and edit workflows

components.name: Form
components.description: A form wrapper component with built-in validation and submission handling

examples.title: Form with Multiple Fields
examples.code: <Form onSubmit={(data) => console.log(data)}><FormField name="name" label="Name" /><FormField name="email" label="Email" type="email" /><Button type="submit">Register</Button></Form>

components.name: FormField
components.description: A form field component with label, input, error message, and helper text support

examples.title: Form Field with Label
examples.code: <FormField name="email" label="Email Address" placeholder="Enter your email" />

components.name: Select
components.description: A dropdown select component with search and multi-select capabilities, built with Radix UI

examples.title: Large Select
examples.code: <Select size="lg"><SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Choose" /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="a">Choice A</SelectItem><SelectItem value="b">Choice B</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select>

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: A checkbox input component with label and indeterminate state support, built with Radix UI

examples.title: Simple Checkbox
examples.code: <Checkbox id="terms" label="Accept terms and conditions" description="Required before checkout can continue." />

examples.title: Large Checkbox
examples.code: <Checkbox id="newsletter" label="Subscribe to release updates" size="lg" />

components.name: Radio
components.description: A radio button component for selecting a single option from a group, built with Radix UI

examples.title: Radio Group
examples.code: <RadioGroup><Radio value="standard" label="Standard review" description="Route to the normal operations queue." /><Radio value="priority" label="Priority queue" description="Surface this item for same-day review." /></RadioGroup>

examples.title: Large Radio Buttons
examples.code: <RadioGroup><Radio value="compact" label="Compact" size="sm" /><Radio value="balanced" label="Balanced" size="md" /><Radio value="spacious" label="Spacious" size="lg" /></RadioGroup>

components.name: Popover
components.description: Displays rich content in a floating panel triggered by a click, built with Radix UI

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Displays informational text when hovering or focusing on an element, built with Radix UI

components.name: Textarea
components.description: A textarea component with validation states and sizes for multi-line text input

components.name: Switch
components.description: A toggle switch component for boolean on/off states, built with Radix UI

examples.title: Switch with Label

components.name: Container
components.description: A responsive container component with max-width constraints and optional padding

components.name: Grid
components.description: A responsive CSS Grid layout component with configurable columns and gap

components.name: Stack
components.description: A stack component for vertical or horizontal stacking with consistent spacing

components.name: Flex
components.description: A flexible flexbox layout component for common alignment and distribution patterns

components.name: Spacer
components.description: A spacer component for adding fixed or flexible spacing between elements

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: A dropdown menu component for displaying actions or options triggered by a button click, built with Radix UI

components.name: AlertDialog
components.description: A modal dialog for confirming destructive or important actions that requires explicit user response, built with Radix UI

components.name: Toast
components.description: Lightweight notification messages with declarative components and an imperative toast API

components.name: Alert
components.description: An inline feedback message component for displaying contextual alerts with dismiss support

examples.title: Dismissible Alert
examples.code: <Alert variant="warning" dismissible onDismiss={() => {}}><AlertTitle>Warning</AlertTitle><AlertDescription>Please review your input.</AlertDescription></Alert>

components.name: Progress
components.description: A progress bar component for displaying completion percentage with multiple variants

components.name: Spinner
components.description: An animated loading spinner indicator with multiple sizes and color variants

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: A placeholder loading component with pulse animation for content that is loading

examples.title: Card Skeleton

components.name: Accordion
components.description: A collapsible content component for organizing information into expandable sections, built with Radix UI

examples.title: Single Accordion
examples.code: <Accordion type="single" collapsible><AccordionItem value="item-1"><AccordionTrigger>Section 1</AccordionTrigger><AccordionContent>Content for section 1</AccordionContent></AccordionItem><AccordionItem value="item-2"><AccordionTrigger>Section 2</AccordionTrigger><AccordionContent>Content for section 2</AccordionContent></AccordionItem></Accordion>

components.name: Separator
components.description: A visual divider component for separating content sections, built with Radix UI

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: A navigation component for displaying the current page location within a hierarchical structure

components.name: CommandMenu
components.description: Searchable command surface for backoffice navigation, record lookup, and operator actions

examples.title: Operations Command Menu
examples.code: <CommandMenu label="Operations command menu"><CommandMenuInput placeholder="Search orders or actions..." /><CommandMenuList><CommandMenuGroup heading="Orders"><CommandMenuItem value="open order 4821" meta="Northwind Supply" badge="Review" shortcut="O 1">Open ORD-4821</CommandMenuItem></CommandMenuGroup></CommandMenuList></CommandMenu>

components.name: ViewSwitcher
components.description: A saved-view and operational-queue switcher for backoffice tables and dashboards

examples.title: Order Queues
examples.code: <ViewSwitcher aria-label="Order views"><ViewSwitcherItem value="all" selected count={128}>All orders</ViewSwitcherItem><ViewSwitcherItem value="review" count={12}>Needs review</ViewSwitcherItem></ViewSwitcher>

components.name: SidebarNav
components.description: Grouped sidebar navigation with active states, badges, and icon slots for admin workspaces

components.name: Collapsible
components.description: An expandable section for hiding and revealing content, built with Radix UI

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Composable pagination building blocks for navigating through pages of content

examples.title: Pagination with usePagination
examples.code: const pages = usePagination({ totalPages: 20, currentPage: 5 });\n<Pagination><PaginationContent>{pages.map((p, i) => <PaginationItem key={i}>{p === 'ellipsis' ? <PaginationEllipsis /> : <PaginationLink isActive={p === 5}>{p}</PaginationLink>}</PaginationItem>)}</PaginationContent></Pagination>

components.name: Slider
components.description: A slider input for selecting a value or range within a bounded interval, built with Radix UI

examples.title: Controlled Slider
examples.code: const [value, setValue] = useState([30]);\n<Slider value={value} onValueChange={setValue} min={0} max={100} />

components.name: Combobox
components.description: A searchable, filterable dropdown input built on cmdk and Radix Popover

components.name: Calendar
components.description: A calendar component for date selection, built on react-day-picker v9

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: An input trigger with a calendar popover for selecting dates, composing Popover, Calendar, and Button

examples.title: Basic DatePicker
examples.code: const [date, setDate] = useState<Date>();\n<DatePicker value={date} onChange={setDate} placeholder="Pick a date" />

components.name: TimePicker
components.description: A compact popover time selector for operational forms and scheduling controls

components.name: DateTimePicker
components.description: Date and time pickers for scheduling, windows, publish times, and backoffice cutoffs

components.name: DateFilter
components.description: A date-range filter with operational presets for tables, reports, and dashboards

components.name: MultiSelect
components.description: A searchable multi-select with removable chips and hidden inputs for native forms

components.name: TagsInput
components.description: A tag entry field for labels, segments, and operational metadata

components.name: FileUpload
components.description: A local file picker and dropzone for attachment selection without upload transport

components.name: NumberInput
components.description: A numeric input with optional steppers, clamping, and precision handling

components.name: PasswordInput
components.description: A password input with accessible show and hide controls

components.name: Stepper
components.description: A compact stepper for multi-step forms, setup flows, and review workflows
